title: Structure Swooper Catalog Index Target Topology
forbids: Swooper catalog cutover source files missing or retired transitional catalog-index authority still present
why: Packet 9 makes the tracked catalog source index the catalog generation input and splits Studio catalog metadata generation into its own source-owned generator.
remediate: Keep the catalog index source files and Studio catalog metadata generator in place, and do not restore the retired Packet 4 transitional advisory rule.
message: Swooper catalog index cutover topology drifted.
